# Tutorial Clarity

> Tutorial Clarity is a web app that enhances YouTube video learning. It helps students, professionals, and self-learners get more out of tutorial videos by adding AI-powered tools directly on top of any YouTube video.

## What it does

Tutorial Clarity wraps any YouTube video URL with a suite of learning tools:

- **Clarify Audio** — Multi-speaker AI text-to-speech re-narration. Detects speakers via AssemblyAI, assigns distinct voices via OpenAI TTS, and plays back the video with clear, natural-sounding audio — useful when the original instructor audio is hard to follow.
- **Sherlock Spyglass** — A magnifying lens that lets you pause the video and explore any area at up to 5x zoom, perfect for finding tiny mouse cursors or small UI elements on high-resolution screens.
- **Zoom** — Pause, draw a rectangle over any region of the video, and that region fills the entire screen.
- **Scroll Transcript** — Live scrolling captions that follow along as the video plays.
- **AI Definitions** — Highlight any word or phrase in the transcript to get an instant AI-powered definition in context.
- **AI Summary** — On-demand GPT-4o summary of the full video.
- **Formatted Transcript** — GPT-4o cleaned and formatted transcript, downloadable as .txt.
- **Resume Previous Video** — Auto-saves your position every 10 seconds across up to 10 videos.
- **Saved Videos** — Save YouTube videos via a Chrome extension for quick access later.
- **Speed & Volume controls** — Fine-grained playback speed and volume adjustment.

## Who it's for

- Students following coding, design, or academic tutorials
- Professionals learning new software or workflows
- Anyone who struggles with fast-talking or unclear instructors
- Learners who want searchable, downloadable transcripts

## Pricing

- 2-week free trial, no credit card required
- $12.99/month or $99/year
- Free tier after trial: Zoom, Resume, Saved Videos, Shortcuts, Transcript scroll
- Clarify Audio sessions: 20/month included, $8.99 for 20 more (stackable)

Owner: Larry Eppler
